query: Nintendo Switch 2 Japan weekly sales Famitsu May 2026 price hike surge
answer:
## Research Report: Nintendo Switch 2 Japan Weekly Sales (Famitsu) — May 2026 & Price Hike Surge

### 1. Weekly Hardware Sales in Japan (Famitsu-Tracked)

The following Famitsu-tracked weekly hardware sales data for Nintendo Switch 2 in Japan has been compiled from Gematsu and Famitsu:

| Week Period | Weekly Units | Cumulative (Lifetime) |
|---|---|---|
| Mar 30 – Apr 5, 2026 | **59,543** | **5,011,059** |
| Apr 6 – Apr 12, 2026 | **52,058** | **5,063,117** |
| Apr 13 – Apr 19, 2026 | **44,280** | **5,107,397** |
| Apr 20 – Apr 26, 2026 | **45,825** | **5,153,222** |
| Apr 27 – May 10, 2026 (2-week combined) | **214,438** | **5,367,660** |

The April 27–May 10 figure is a combined two-week report covering Japan's **Golden Week** holiday period. This averages ~107,000 units/week — a **4–5x increase** over the ~45,000–52,000 weekly pace in earlier April.

**Japan Cumulative Total**: As of May 10, 2026, the Switch 2 has sold **5,367,660 units** in Japan.

---

### 2. Price Hike Details

Nintendo announced sweeping price increases, citing **"changes in market conditions"** and the **"global business outlook"** (widely interpreted as tariff/cost pressures):

**Japan (effective May 25, 2026):**
- **Switch 2 (Japan-only model)**: **+20.0% increase** (~+10,000 yen, from ~¥49,980)
- The region-free Switch 2 model reportedly unchanged in Japan
- All original Switch models in Japan also affected
- Nintendo Switch Online pricing increased effective **July 1, 2026**

**Western Markets (effective September 1, 2026):**
- **US**: +$50 increase (~11.1%)
- **EU**: +€30 increase (~6.4%)
- **UK**: Not affected at time of announcement

---

### 3. Pre-Price-Hike Surge Analysis

The Japan price hike takes effect **May 25, 2026** — only ~2 weeks after the latest available Famitsu data (May 10). The Golden Week period (Apr 27–May 10) already showed a massive **214,438-unit** two-week surge. A further pre-price-hike rush-buy is anticipated in the **May 11–24 window**, but that Famitsu data has not yet been published. The next weekly report will be the key indicator.

---

### 4. Global Context

Per Nintendo's official financial results (~May 2026):
- **Switch 2 global lifetime sales**: **19.86 million units** (as of ~March 31, 2026)
- This surpassed Nintendo's revised forecast of 19 million
- Already exceeded Wii U's entire lifetime sales (13.56 million)
- **FY2027 global forecast**: Lowered to **16.5 million units**, reflecting anticipated price increase impact
- **Net sales**: Up 98.6% at ¥2,313.0 billion
- **Operating profit**: Up 27.5% at ¥360.1 billion

---

### 5. Competitive Context (Apr 27 – May 10, Japan)

| Platform | Two-Week Units | Cumulative |
|---|---|---|
| Switch 2 | 214,438 | 5,367,660 |
| Switch OLED | 16,850 | 9,571,489 |
| PS5 Digital | 16,539 | 1,283,342 |
| PS5 Pro | 5,248 | 355,220 |
| Xbox Series (all) | 513 | ~698,834 |

Switch 2 outsells the entire PS5 family combined by roughly **9:1** in Japan.

---

### 6. Software Performance (Famitsu, May 4–10, Physical Only)

Top Switch 2 titles in Japan:
- **Mario Kart World**: 10,941 weekly / **2,925,858 cumulative** (approaching 3M physical)
- **Pokémon Pokopia**: 28,312 weekly / **978,706 cumulative** (approaching 1M)
- **Pokémon Legends: Z-A SW2 Ed.**: 2,283 weekly / **1,120,703 cumulative** (past 1M)
- **Kirby Air Riders**: 3,157 weekly / **527,490 cumulative**
- **Donkey Kong Bananza**: 1,717 weekly / **498,585 cumulative**

---

key_facts: Nintendo Switch 2 has sold 5,367,660 cumulative units in Japan as of May 10, 2026 (Famitsu-tracked).
Golden Week period (Apr 27–May 10) saw a combined 214,438 units sold — roughly 4–5x the normal weekly pace of ~45,000–52,000 units.
Nintendo announced a 20% price hike for the Japan-only Switch 2 model, effective May 25, 2026 (~+¥10,000 from ~¥49,980).
A pre-price-hike buying surge is expected in the May 11–24 window but Famitsu data for that period has not yet been published.
US price hike of +$50 and EU price hike of +€30 are scheduled for September 1, 2026.
Switch 2 global lifetime sales reached 19.86 million units as of ~March 31, 2026, surpassing Nintendo's revised 19M forecast.
Nintendo lowered its FY2027 global forecast to 16.5 million Switch 2 units, reflecting anticipated price hike impact.
Switch 2 outsells the entire PS5 family combined by roughly 9:1 in Japan during the Golden Week period.
Mario Kart World has reached nearly 3 million cumulative physical sales in Japan.
Nintendo cited 'changes in market conditions' and 'global business outlook' as reasons for the price increase.
Switch 2 has already surpassed the Wii U's entire lifetime sales (13.56 million) globally in under 10 months.
Nintendo Switch Online pricing in Japan will increase effective July 1, 2026.
